steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to name the sculpture (Sister), identify Collett as its creator, and state the year it was created (1973). All three pieces of information must appear.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Marian Collett, a celebrated artist, was born in 1915.: gives a year other than 1973, so it fails the date requirement. ✗
  • Choice B — Celebrated artist Marian Collett is best known for creating sculptures and prints that explore the Black experience.: identifies Collett's broader artistic focus but omits both Sister and 1973. ✗
  • Choice C — Marian Collett was a celebrated artist who created prints as well as sculptures.: similarly leaves out 1973. ✗
  • Choice D — Marian Collett created the bronze sculpture Sister in 1973.: supplies all three required elements — creator, title, and year. ✓
That matches Choice D — Marian Collett created the bronze sculpture Sister in 1973..
